metadata.siteDescription: MediBoo is a family health journal: symptoms, fever, medications, doctor visits, and test results — organized in one calm timeline.

site.tagline: Calm family health journal on iOS

landing.eyebrow: A simple health journal for the whole family
landing.title: Track symptoms, fever, and medications — clearly, with timestamps.
landing.description: Capture symptoms with date and time, set medication schedules with reminders, save doctor visit notes and attachments, and keep test results per profile — for kids, adults, or anyone you care for.
landing.appPreviewAlt: MediBoo app preview — family health journal and fever calendar
chips: Privacy-first: no AI training on your health data
App Lock with PIN or device biometrics
Fever calendar with clear color cues

features.title: Everything you need in one health timeline.
features.description: MediBoo keeps illness history readable: symptoms, doses, visits, and results — built to be fast, calm, and safe to use.

cards.title: Symptoms & illness history
cards.body: Log cough, runny nose, pain, fever and more with precise timestamps to see the full course of illness.

cards.title: Medication schedules + reminders
cards.body: Plan treatment duration and daily doses, then rely on device notifications to stay consistent.

cards.title: Visits, notes, attachments, results
cards.body: Write questions for the doctor, store visit notes, attach photos/PDFs, and keep test results and vaccinations together per profile.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to keep care under control.
howItWorks.description: Add quick entries during the day. When you need a follow-up, you have a clear story ready to share.
items: Pick a profile and log symptoms or temperature in seconds (date and time included).
Record a medication dose or create a schedule with reminders.
Bring visit notes, questions, attachments, and a clear calendar view into appointments.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.description: Quick answers about profiles, privacy, and the dose calculator source.

items.question: Can I use MediBoo for more than one person?
items.answer: Yes. Create multiple profiles for kids, adults, and anyone you want to track. Each profile has its own separate health history.

items.question: How do you protect sensitive health data?
items.answer: MediBoo does not use AI models to learn from your health entries. You can also enable App Lock with a PIN or device biometrics.

items.question: What is the fever dose calculator based on?
items.answer: It uses weight-based dosing guidance (mg/kg). Source: World Health Organization (WHO), Pocket Book of Hospital Care for Children. It is informational and does not replace medical advice.

cta.title: Start your family health journal today.
cta.description: Record faster. Worry less. Walk into appointments with a clear history.

testimonials.title: Families say it reduces stress.
testimonials.description: A calmer routine, fewer forgotten details, and clearer doctor visits — that’s the common theme.

items.name: Marta K.
items.quote: During fever nights I used to lose track. Now I have timestamps for temperature, meds, and symptoms. Huge relief.

items.name: Bartek C.
items.quote: Reminders keep us consistent, and sharing the same history with my partner avoids confusion.

items.name: Kasia W.
items.quote: Doctor visits are easier because I show a simple timeline instead of trying to remember everything.

items.name: Michal P.
items.quote: We also track grandparents’ meds and results. One app, multiple profiles, less mental load.

items.name: Ewa S.
items.role: Mom of 2 plus grandparents in one profile
items.quote: The fever calendar makes patterns obvious. It’s easy to answer ‘when did it start?’ with confidence.

waitlist.title: Join the early access list
waitlist.successBody: Thanks! You’re on the Android waitlist.
waitlist.consent: I agree to receive launch updates about the Android release.
waitlist.error: We could not save your request. Please try again in a moment.

footer.description: Calm tools for managing pediatric routines, daily symptoms, and practical follow-ups with less mental overhead.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These terms describe the basic rules for using the MediBoo website and mobile application.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what information MediBoo processes and how it is used to support the service.

deleteData.title: Request permanent data deletion
deleteData.description: Use this form to request removal of your MediBoo account data. We may contact you to verify ownership before deletion is completed.
deleteData.note: Include the email used in the app and enough context for us to identify the account.
deleteData.successBody: Thanks! We received your request and will respond by email if needed.
deleteData.messagePlaceholder: Please delete all account data connected to this email address.
deleteData.error: We could not send the form. Please try again.
